overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates industrial streets, covered plazas, urban intersections, and elevated highways while rain streaks across the windshield and neon signs illuminate the wet roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service road with orange barriers

agents.ego_description: driving straight through industrial corridor with orange barriers lining the right side

entered.detail: bright orange construction barriers lining the right side of the road
large industrial structure with metal facade and minimal windows
concrete overpass or roof structure covering the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered industrial corridor with orange barriers on the right and industrial buildings on the left. The road is wet from heavy rain, and the area is dimly lit with artificial lighting from overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit plaza with teal walls

events.description: passing through large orange gate structure into covered plaza area
lighting brightens as vehicle enters covered plaza with overhead fluorescent lights

agents.ego_description: driving through large gate structure into covered plaza with teal walls

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead driving through plaza toward exit

entered.detail: massive industrial gate structure with orange beams framing the entrance
turquoise colored walls with large red X symbols painted on them
palm trees planted inside the covered plaza area

segments.scene_description: Passing through a massive orange industrial gate into a covered plaza with distinctive teal walls marked with red X symbols. The area is populated with sparse pedestrians and palm trees, with brighter artificial lighting overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with teal sidewalk borders

events.description: camera pans right to look at pedestrian on sidewalk before returning to forward view

agents.ego_description: following traffic on city street, briefly glancing right at pedestrian with umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking on sidewalk as camera pans to look
dark SUV driving ahead in same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: turquoise colored curb and sidewalk border running along the right side
multi-story urban buildings with neon signage and illuminated windows
bright neon advertisements and store signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Driving on an open urban street lined with teal sidewalk borders and city buildings featuring neon signs. The vehicle follows traffic while the camera briefly pans right to observe a pedestrian with an umbrella walking on the wet sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection and highway ramp entrance

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection and navigates around corner
entering elevated highway ramp from city street intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating intersection turns and merging onto elevated highway ramp

notable_agents.action: red vehicle passing through intersection from left side

entered.detail: curved entrance ramp leading up to elevated highway with concrete walls
multi-level highway interchange with concrete pillars and overpasses
suspended traffic signals showing green for through traffic

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a wide urban intersection with traffic lights, turning right and merging onto an elevated highway ramp. The area features complex overpass structures and concrete walls lining the ramp entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with curves and neon billboards

events.description: navigating curved ramp on elevated highway with slight banking

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated highway ramp with curves, maintaining steady speed in rain

entered.detail: raised multi-lane highway with yellow and black striped guardrails
large illuminated advertising screens with pink and red neon graphics
distant futuristic skyscrapers visible through the rain and haze

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway with curved sections, bordered by yellow guardrails and overlooking the city skyline. Large neon billboards illuminate the right side while the road continues through the rainy night with distant skyscrapers visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a dim industrial corridor into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic city skyline. It begins by navigating a wet, covered industrial passage flanked by orange barriers and dark buildings under heavy rain. As the vehicle passes through a massive orange gate, the environment opens into a covered plaza characterized by teal walls with red X symbols and sparse pedestrians among palm trees. The scene then shifts onto an open urban street where neon signs illuminate the wet pavement, briefly panning toward a pedestrian with an umbrella before the camera navigates a wide intersection and merges onto an elevated highway ramp. Finally, the perspective climbs along curved highway sections bordered by yellow guardrails, overlooking a rainy cityscape dominated by towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards.
